title: Player Visibility Toggler
description: A remaster of SelectRenderedPlayer for newer versions.
body: This is a remaster of [SelectRenderedPlayer ](https://github.com/ItsSyfe/SRP/releases/tag/v2.0) for newer minecraft versions. The mod allows you to stop rendering all player entitys. It has been configured to keep Hypixel NPCs rendered. Included is a whitelist and blacklist that allows full control of who you see if any at all. There are two keybinds; one that toggles the renderer and one that opens a custom GUI that allows for accesibility. Both can be found in the regular keybinds menu under "Player Visibility Toggler".
